commands.author: Alix-007
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5d5d83a795f11ca3cea772e33bec0df92ec0e7a3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wires `/status` and Gateway startup into model context-window cache warming, delegates status summary context resolution through `context.ts`, and adds focused context/status regression tests.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +132. Total +146 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. with medium confidence: the PR discussion and inspected recording show the cold-start `/status` symptom and after-fix output, and the source path explains why cache-only resolution can fall back to 200k. I did not run a live current-main repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are concrete file-local repairs: restore lazy imports, keep status read-only, avoid blocking Gateway startup, and rebase without dropping current-main status filtering.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
